name: Southwest Ham and Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Place one slice of ham on each of three tortillas.
2. Top each with cheese, another slice of ham, and a tortilla.
3. Heat two tablespoons of oil in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat until hot.
4. Cook one sandwich in the oil, turning once, until golden brown and cheese is melted, about 3 minutes.
5. Cut into four wedges.
6. Repeat with remaining oil and sandwiches.
